name: clean thyroid US — TR2 nodule, right lobe

report.technique: High-resolution greyscale and colour Doppler ultrasound of the thyroid gland and central neck.
report.findings: Right lobe: 8 mm spongiform nodule, wider-than-tall, peripheral vascularity, without microcalcifications. Left lobe and isthmus: sonographically benign without focal lesion. Cervical lymph nodes are sonographically benign.
report.impression:
1. Right thyroid lobe 8 mm spongiform nodule, TR2 (not suspicious).
2. No suspicious left lobe or isthmus nodule.
report.recommendations: No follow-up imaging recommended per ACR TI-RADS for TR2.
